testimonials.quote: My son has dyslexia and I was so nervous about tackling Shakespeare. Kim made Macbeth genuinely approachable without dumbing it down. He actually looked forward to class every week.
We signed up again without hesitation. There is something rare happening in this class — my daughter is reading harder books and thinking more carefully than I ever expected at this age.
The honors track is everything. Kim runs both levels simultaneously and neither group feels shortchanged. My son is being genuinely challenged for the first time in his homeschool years.
